text:
Sonne Limarch's Used Tissue is a collectable item with a DNA certificate. It was for sale at the Underground Auction. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 72 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

The actor Sonne Limarch's used tissue was one of the items for sale at the Underground Auction and one of the items Tocino, Ivlenkov, and Baise were told to obtain for Neon Nostrade. 

After the Phantom Troupe's massacre all around the Cemetery Building, Light Nostrade tells the bodyguards that the tissue is the only item they need to bid on and win for his daughter. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 101 

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

In the manga and 1999 anime adaptation, Sonne Limarch and the used tissue are only mentioned, Hunter × Hunter - Episode 51 (1999) while in the 2011 anime adaptation an image of the tissue with the DNA certificate are shown. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 41 (2011)
